title: Chubb Limited 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary source for Chubb's business segments, underwriting profile, risk factors, and 2024 financial performance.

title: Commercial Insurance
note: Describes Chubb's U.S. commercial insurance offering across small business, middle market, large corporate, and industry-specific risks.

title: Insurance for Individuals & Families
note: Describes Chubb's personal insurance and risk-management services for individuals and families.

title: Chubb Personal Insurance Valuable Articles Coverage
note: Supports the personal-lines discussion with an example of Chubb's valuables coverage and high-net-worth personal risk focus.

title: Chubb Market Cap
note: Provides a current market capitalization reference for Chubb around the registry refresh date.

title: Chubb Statistics & Valuation
note: Provides valuation metrics including trailing P/E used for the input metrics.

title: Openkoda Insurtech Platform
note: Describes Openkoda as an open-source insurance application platform with code ownership and no vendor lock-in.

title: Insurance Policy Management Software
note: Documents Openkoda's insurance policy management capabilities for brokers, MGAs, agencies, and related insurance workflows.

title: openkoda/openkoda GitHub Repository
note: Public repository showing Openkoda's MIT-licensed source code and insurance-related templates.

title: BIND Standard
note: Open insurance interoperability standard used as an enabler for federated submissions, policies, coverages, and claims data.

title: What is Nayms?
note: Documents an Ethereum smart-contract marketplace for creating, underwriting, tokenizing, trading, and settling insurance policies on-chain.

title: Nayms Quantstamp Verification Certificate
note: Provides third-party smart-contract audit context for the on-chain insurance-marketplace enabler.

title: InsureConnect: Blockchain and Digital Identity for the Property Insurance Market
note: Research source for verifiable credentials, decentralized identifiers, IPFS, and blockchain-backed property-insurance workflows.
